title: Remove OpenSearch resources from prototype CDK stack
description:
After readiness gate passes, remove OpenSearch domain/resources and related outputs from the prototype CDK stack while preserving S3 Vectors and embeddings bucket.

Include a rollback note in task comments.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implementation progress: removed standalone prototype stack files infrastructure/stacks/opensearch_stack.py, infrastructure/deploy_opensearch.py, and infrastructure/OPENSEARCH_DEPLOY.md as part of removing OpenSearch from standalone CDK provisioning path.
